properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Yeah You're the same God today And the same God tomorrow Help me see the victory You already see

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let my faith be today What it will be tomorrow When I've seen the victory You already see Ohh Jesus, I believe, oh-ohh

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We need a miracle, you are the miracle maker God of the impossible, there is no power greater Exceeding, abundant, beyond what we could ask or think We call on your name, Jesus, yeah

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: By the power of your name and all for your glory The sick are healed, the soul is filled, the battle has been won On your promise I stand and in faith I believe it That what I pray in your name, it's already done Oh-ohh, let your will be done, oh, ohh

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We need a miracle, you are the miracle maker God of the impossible, there is no power greater Exceeding, abundant, beyond what we could ask or think We call on your name, Jesus (ohh, yeah, hmm)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: In the waiting, you get the glory In the healing, you get the glory In the breaking, you get the glory And in the breakthrough, you get the glory

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: In the waiting, you get the glory (in the healing) In the healing, you get the glory (in the breaking) In the breaking, you get the glory (and in the breakthrough) In the breakthrough, you get the glory (you get the glory)

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: You get the glory, you get the glory You get the glory, you get the glory You get the glory, you get the glory You get the glory, you get the glory

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: you are the miracle maker (Say) God of the impossible, there is no power greater Exceeding, abundant, beyond what we could ask or think We call on your name (ohh, we need)

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: We need a miracle (yes we do) you are the miracle maker God of the impossible, there is no power greater Exceeding (exceeding) abundant (abundant) Beyond what we could ask or think We call on your name (we call on your name) We call on your name (we call on your name) We call on your name Say Jesus

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Yes Lord, the name above all names Hallelujah
